headline: CenterPoint (CNP) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Jason Wells: Thank you, Ben, and good morning, everyone.  Second, I'll provide an update on our load outlook for Houston Electric, including yet another significant increase in our firmly committed load forecast to 12.2 gigawatts of new industrial load.  Third, I will cover how our continued and accelerating growth in the greater Houston area to provide incremental capital investment opportunities and further support customer affordability.

headline: CenterPoint Energy reports strong Q1 2026 results; reiterates full-year 2026 guidance; provides an update on Houston Electric load growth
summary: HOUSTON, April 23, 2026--CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP), or "CenterPoint," today reported net income of $316 million, or $0.48 per diluted share, on a GAAP basis for the first quarter of 2026, compared to $0.45 per diluted share in the comparable period of 2025.
